btn_styles.properties:
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.6) 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);

transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(-6deg) translateZ(12px) scale(1.06);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.4), 0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,0.2), 0 0 100px rgba(168,85,247,0.1), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(1deg) rotateY(-1deg) translateZ(-5px) scale(0.97);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(-2deg) rotateY(2deg) translateZ(8px) scale(1.03);

background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.6) 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);

transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(-6deg) translateZ(12px) scale(1.06);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.4), 0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,0.2), 0 0 100px rgba(168,85,247,0.1), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(1deg) rotateY(-1deg) translateZ(-5px) scale(0.97);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(-2deg) rotateY(2deg) translateZ(8px) scale(1.03);

all_rules.properties:
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.2), rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.2));
  border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);

background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2), rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.15));
  border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);

  border: 1px solid rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);

background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2), rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.15));
  border: 1px solid rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.3);

background: 
    
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
    
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 15% 85%, rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
    
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 85% 15%, rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.10) 0%, transparent 50%),
    
    radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 40% at 50% 50%, rgba(56, 189, 248, 0.05) 0%, transparent 60%),
    
    linear-gradient(180deg, 
      #0F172A 0%,     
      #111827 20%,    
      #0F172A 50%,    
      #1A1F2E 80%,    
      #0F172A 100%    
    ) !important;
  animation: bgShift 40s ease-in-out infinite !important;

background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.18) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 15% 85%, rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),

position: fixed;

top: 10%; right: 30%;

top: 20%; right: 60%;
  animation: meteorFall2 12s ease-in infinite 5s;

top: 5%; right: 80%;
  animation: meteorFall3 10s ease-in infinite 8s;

background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(0, 255, 150, 0.12) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 40% at 20% 80%, rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.10) 0%, transparent 50%),

    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.20) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 80% 20%, rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.12) 0%, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 30% at 20% 80%, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.10) 0%, transparent 50%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #FFF7ED 0%, #FEF3C7 15%, #FDE68A 35%, #BFDBFE 60%, #93C5FD 80%, #60A5FA 100%);

background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.5), transparent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 230, 118, 0.3);

background:
    radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 50% at 50% 0%, rgba(251, 191, 36, 0.15) 0%, transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 50% 40% at 20% 80%, rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.08) 0%, transparent 50%),
    radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 30% at 80% 30%, rgba(251, 146, 60, 0.06) 0%, transparent 50%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, #FFF8F0 0%, #FFEDD5 20%, #FED7AA 40%, #FDBA74 60%, #FB923C 80%, #F97316 100%);

background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.8) 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.6) 100%);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.9);

box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(96, 165, 250, 0.3);
  animation: badgePulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;

background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,255,255,0.15), transparent) !important;
  box-shadow: none !important;

background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3), rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3)) !important;
  transform: translateY(-2px) !important;

transform: scale(1.1) rotate(5deg);
  filter: drop-shadow(0 0 10px currentColor);

transform: translateY(-4px) scale(1.02);
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);

opacity: 1;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,212,255,0.6) 30%, rgba(168,85,247,0.5) 50%, rgba(0,212,255,0.6) 70%, transparent 100%);

transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(1deg) rotateY(-1deg) translateZ(-4px) scale(0.98);
  transition-duration: 0.1s;

background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(0,230,118,0.6), transparent) !important;
  opacity: 1;

background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,23,68,0.6), transparent) !important;
  opacity: 1;
0%,100% { transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(0) translateZ(-8px);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(-8px) translateZ(-8px);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(6px) translateZ(-8px);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(-5px) translateZ(-8px);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(4px) translateZ(-8px);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-3deg) translateX(-2px) translateZ(-8px);
0% { opacity: 0; transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(-20deg) rotateX(8deg) translateZ(-120px) scale(0.85); filter: blur(4px);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(3deg) rotateX(-1deg) translateZ(20px) scale(1.02);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(0deg) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px) scale(1);
0%,100% { transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(0deg) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px) translateY(0px);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(10deg) rotateX(-6deg) translateZ(25px) translateY(-10px);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(0deg) rotateX(6deg) translateZ(35px) translateY(-5px);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(-10deg) rotateX(-4deg) translateZ(20px) translateY(-12px);
0% { opacity: 0; transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(12deg) translateZ(-60px) translateY(30px); filter: blur(3px);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px) translateY(0px);

transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(-6deg) translateZ(12px) scale(1.06);
  box-shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.4), 0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,0.2), 0 0 100px rgba(168,85,247,0.1), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(1deg) rotateY(-1deg) translateZ(-5px) scale(0.97);
0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) perspective(800px) rotateY(0deg) scale(0.3); filter: blur(4px);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: translate(-50%,-50%) perspective(800px) rotateY(90deg) rotateX(10deg) scale(1.3);
opacity: 1; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) perspective(800px) rotateY(270deg) rotateX(-5deg) scale(1.1);
opacity: 0.6; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) perspective(800px) rotateY(360deg) scale(1.6) translateY(-30px);
opacity: 0; transform: translate(-50%,-50%) perspective(800px) rotateY(360deg) scale(2.2) translateY(-80px);
0% { opacity: 0; transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(10deg) translateZ(-40px) scale(0.92); filter: blur(2px);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px) scale(1);
0% { opacity: 0; transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(-30deg) rotateX(15deg) translateZ(-180px) scale(0.7); filter: blur(6px);
opacity: 1; filter: blur(0); transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(5deg) rotateX(-2deg) translateZ(30px) scale(1.04);
opacity: 1; transform: perspective(1200px) rotateY(0deg) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px) scale(1);

transform-style: preserve-3d;
  animation: logo3DGlassGlow 5s ease-in-out infinite;
0%,100% { transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(0deg) translateZ(0px); text-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,212,255,0.8), 0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,0.4);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(2deg) translateZ(12px); text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,212,255,1), 0 0 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(168,85,247,0.3);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(4deg) translateZ(20px); text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,1), 0 0 50px rgba(0,212,255,0.6), 0 0 80px rgba(168,85,247,0.4);
transform: perspective(800px) rotateX(2deg) rotateY(-2deg) translateZ(12px); text-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,212,255,1), 0 0 40px rgba(0,212,255,0.5), 0 0 60px rgba(168,85,247,0.3);
transform: perspective(var(--perspective)) rotateX(-1deg) rotateY(1deg) translateZ(8px) scale(1.01);
transform: perspective(1000px) rotateX(-2deg) rotateY(2deg) translateZ(8px) scale(1.03);

transform-style: preserve-3d;

transform-style: preserve-3d;

transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(-5deg) translateZ(15px) translateY(-4px);
